description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI-Linux that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow can also be triggered manually with an optional debug_enabled input. Set up an ubuntu-latest environment with a 120-minute timeout, and perform a series of steps including checking out the repository, initializing submodules, installing CMake, linuxdeploy, and dependencies, caching Qt, compiling and installing various projects, building and packaging the project, and uploading artifacts.
